sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kalvary ah Honpa en dih vaw,
Nang le kei ading thuak hilo maw;
Itna tawh hong sap lai ngai

sections.label: Chorus
lines: En in, hingta in, En in, hingta in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na kha vangik hong honkhia zo
Nuntak tawntungna na ngah ding hi;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Han pan a tho Jesuh na en ding,
Omna omlai na zuan mengmeng ding;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na paina peuh hong kha dingin om,
